name: Name Cleanup TypeScript Config
outcome_goal: All DAG/Dag naming removed from TypeScript, CSS, and config files. RunDAG -> RunGraph, DagLayout -> GraphLayout, canvas-dag -> canvas-graph, dag-app -> praxis-app.
anti_requirements: Do NOT modify Python files — those are handled by Run 1

jobs.label: rename_run_graph
jobs.description: Rename RunDAG component -> RunGraph and .run-dag CSS -> .run-graph
jobs.outcome_goal: No RunDAG or run-dag references remain in dashboard/
jobs.prompt:
Rename the `RunDAG` function component and its CSS classes in the dashboard:

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/dashboard/RunDetailView.tsx`:
   - Find the function `RunDAG` (around line 81) and rename it to `RunGraph`
   - Update any JSX references like `<RunDAG` to `<RunGraph`
   - Update any comments mentioning 'Run DAG' to 'Run graph'
   - Replace all `run-dag` CSS class references with `run-graph` (e.g. `run-dag__edge` -> `run-graph__edge`, `run-dag__column` -> `run-graph__column`, `run-dag__node` -> `run-graph__node`, etc.)

2. In the dashboard CSS file (find it via grep — likely `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/dashboard/dashboard.css` or similar):
   - Replace all `.run-dag` selectors with `.run-graph`

Run: cd Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10

jobs.label: rename_graph_layout
jobs.outcome_goal: No DagLayout references remain in canvas/ directory
jobs.prompt:
Rename the `DagLayout` interface to `GraphLayout` in the Canvas UI:

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/canvas/canvasBuildPresenter.ts`:
   - Line 28: change comment from '--- DAG layout ---' to '--- Graph layout ---'
   - Line 41: rename `interface DagLayout` to `interface GraphLayout`
   - Update ALL references to `DagLayout` in the same file (return types, variable types, etc.)

2. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/canvas/CanvasEdges.tsx`:
   - Update the import from `DagLayout` to `GraphLayout`
   - Update any type annotations using `DagLayout`

Run: cd Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10

jobs.label: rename_canvas_graph_css
jobs.description: Rename .canvas-dag* CSS classes to .canvas-graph* in CSS and TSX
jobs.outcome_goal: No canvas-dag references remain in Canvas UI files
jobs.prompt:
Rename all canvas-dag CSS classes to canvas-graph in the Canvas UI:

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/canvas/canvas-build.css`:
   - Replace ALL `.canvas-dag` selectors with `.canvas-graph`
   - This includes: `.canvas-dag`, `.canvas-dag-node`, `.canvas-dag-node:hover`, `.canvas-dag-node--selected`, `.canvas-dag-node--drag-over`, `.canvas-dag-node__label`, `.canvas-dag-append`, `.canvas-dag-append:hover`, `.canvas-dag-append--drag-over`
   - Each becomes: `.canvas-graph`, `.canvas-graph-node`, `.canvas-graph-node:hover`, etc.

2. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/canvas/CanvasBuildPage.tsx`:
   - Replace ALL `canvas-dag` className strings with `canvas-graph`
   - This includes string literals like `'canvas-dag'`, `'canvas-dag-node'`, `'canvas-dag-node--selected'`, `'canvas-dag-node--drag-over'`, `'canvas-dag-node__label'`, `'canvas-dag-append'`, `'canvas-dag-append--drag-over'`

Do a thorough search-and-replace. There should be ~9 CSS class definitions and several className references in the TSX.

Run: cd Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10

jobs.label: rename_configs
jobs.description: Rename dag-app, dag-api, dag-ui in config/launch files
jobs.outcome_goal: No dag- prefixed names in config or launch files
jobs.prompt:
Update package and launch config names:

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/package-lock.json`:
   - Find and replace `"dag-app"` with `"praxis-app"` (appears on lines 2 and 8)

2. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/.claude/launch.json`:
   - Find and replace `"dag-api"` with `"praxis-api"`

3. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.claude/launch.json`:
   - Find and replace `"dag-ui"` with `"praxis-ui"`

4. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/package.json`:
   - If it has a `"name": "dag-app"` field, change to `"praxis-app"`
